source.clause_quote: You may not use the Services to perform or facilitate dangerous, illegal, or malicious activities

obligations.requirement: Use of a generative AI model must comply with the provider's acceptable-use policy (no prohibited/dangerous use cases).

check.prompt_template: This project calls a generative AI SDK. Judge whether its use case appears to violate the provider's prohibited-use policy. Flag a violation only with positive evidence of a prohibited use case.

fix.guidance: Remove or gate the prohibited use case; review the provider's acceptable-use policy.

source.clause_quote: be transparent ... and disclose ... that content has been AI-generated where required

obligations.requirement: AI-generated content must be disclosed to end users where the provider or law requires it.

check.prompt_template: Judge whether this project, which generates AI content, discloses that the content is AI-generated where required. Flag only with positive evidence that required disclosure is absent.

fix.guidance: Add an AI-generated-content disclosure to the relevant user-facing output.
